name: The Bambies
description: The Bambi entourage are a group of all female Quincies from Bleach, being Sternritters within the Wandenreich army led by Yhwach with each one given their own Schrift ability. The leader Bambietta possesses E the "Explode" allowing her to manipulate surrounding reishi to make orbs which act as devastating bombs. Candice possesses T the "Thunderbolt" which lets her manifest green lightning in various ways using reishi. Meninas possesses P the "Power" granting her incredible physical strength like lifting a large building. Liltotto possesses G the "Glutton" letting her mouth extend to devour any and everything, even briefly copying the target's ability. Giselle possesses Z the "Zombie" letting her use her own blood when splashed onto someone, will turn them into a zombie of her will. They all possess a Vollstandig form, while the wings and halo differ between them they are comprised of reishi which enhance their own abilities nearly tenfold.
creator: AnimeMan1993
